title: Rose Gold Equipment
description: Combine copper and gold to craft rose gold! A highly enchantable tougher version of gold equipment!
body:
## **This mod adds Rose Gold and Rose Gold Accessories**

Rose gold is a new alloy that can be made into tools, armor, decorative blocks, and doors. The tools have a durability a bit above Iron, and a mining speed and enchantability like gold! Raw rose gold is crafted with gold and copper ingots and then smelted. There are also food items that can be crafted with rose gold!

![Items](https://i.imgur.com/FvmHMoV.png)

Durability was recently buffed, and raw recipe changed due to copper tools announcement. Originally this mod was to use up lots of copper, but with copper getting changed it fills the same niche this mod existed in. Now this is a minor improvement over iron, the way copper is over stone.

Join the Discord to pressure me not feature creep copper tools into this mod!
